entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.
entries.value: Course ìkàwé jẹ́ lágbára jù nígbà tí wá ìbéèrè ìwádìí bá mu tí a mọ̀ ọgbọ́n, kókó, tàbí ìlànà.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: Khan Academy alternative fún taara AI ẹ̀kọ́ moments.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: Akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yíyàn láàárín àwọn irinṣẹ́ sábà nílò one ti three things: tí a ṣètò curriculum, taara olùkọ́ fún stuck point, tàbí adaṣe ìyípo yẹn ń mú èrò stay learned.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: Akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ often moves nípasẹ̀ prepared videos, àwọn àpilẹ̀kọ, exercises, àti dashboards.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: Akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ bẹ̀rẹ̀ inside mode-specific chat àti lè béèrè fún simpler model, nira síi ìbéèrè, quiz, kaadi ìrántí akopọ̀, tàbí àtúpalẹ̀.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Kọọkan comparison jẹ́ written láti jẹ́ fair, wúlò, àti action-oriented: kí tí a mọ̀ irinṣẹ́ jẹ́ dára fún, ibo inspir jẹ́ different, àti èyí wo gbangba ipo láti ṣí àkọ́kọ́.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Kọọkan ojú-ìwé àwọn ìjápọ̀ comparison intent láti taara àwọn ipo, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àwọn ìbéèrè, àti AI-readable discovery files.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Gbogbo ìjápọ̀ here jẹ́ gbangba àti crawlable. ìkọ̀kọ̀ onílo chats stay out ti comparison, sitemap, àti AI-readable discovery àwọn fáìlì.

entries.source: inspir comparison pages should be useful without pretending another platform is static. Check official sources for the latest product details.
entries.value: Inspir comparison àwọn ojú-ìwé yẹ kí jẹ́ wúlò láìsí pretending another pẹpẹ jẹ́ static. ṣàyẹ̀wò official sources fún latest ọja àlàyé.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: Inspir jẹ́ tí a kọ́ yí ká gbangba guest AI àwọn ipo: Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìtọ́ni iṣẹ́ ilé, ìṣirò àwọn ìgbésẹ̀, ìdáhùn lórí kíkọ, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àti ẹ̀kọ́ ìṣètò.

entries.value: Ọ̀nà ìbáṣepọ̀

entries.source: Khan Academy alternative
entries.value: Yíyàn míì dípò Khan Academy

entries.source: Khan Academy Alternative for Live AI Tutoring
entries.value: Khan Academy Alternative fún taara ìkọ́ni AI

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Khan Academy jẹ́ tí a kọ́ yí ká gbooro ìkàwé ti àwọn ẹ̀kọ́, adaṣe, tó bá àwọn ìlànà mu àkóónú, àti ìmọ̀ jinlẹ̀ ìtìlẹ́yìn.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy jẹ́ dára gan-an fún tí a ṣètò àwọn ẹ̀kọ́ àti adaṣe. inspir jẹ́ tí a kọ́ fún àsìkò akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò taara, tó ṣeé fún ní ìbéèrè AI ipo yẹn lè fèsì láti tiwọn exact ìbéèrè, draft, ìṣòro, àríyànjiyàn, tàbí ẹ̀kọ́ ṣètò.

entries.source: Khanmigo official page
entries.value: Khanmigo official ojú-ìwé

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ often wá pẹ̀lú ọja wọ́n already mọ̀. wúlò ìdáhùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe winner-take-all; ó jẹ́ èyí wo irinṣẹ́ ìhùwàsí bá mu iṣẹ́.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta ní pato ìbéèrè àti nílò ìrànlọ́wọ́ now.

entries.value: Ẹ̀kọ́ shape

entries.value: Ìrànlọ́wọ́ taara

entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: Taara àwọn ipo, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àti àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́ tó jọmọ́ láti yìí comparison.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Many àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ wá nípasẹ̀ comparing àwọn irinṣẹ́ wọ́n already mọ̀. mọ́ comparison ojú-ìwé ràn lọ́wọ́ wọn yan ẹ̀tọ́ ẹ̀kọ́ ìhùwàsí láìsí fífi pamọ́ tradeoffs.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Rárá. comparison àwọn ìjápọ̀ nìkan láti gbangba guest-mode àwọn ẹnu-ọ̀nà, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, ìbéèrè libraries, àti àwọn ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́. ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved conversations jẹ́ kì í ṣe lò gẹ́gẹ́ bí àkóónú tàbíísun.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Rárá. comparison àwọn ojú-ìwé jẹ́ written láti fi hàn nígbà tí inspir jẹ́ dára síi àkọ́kọ́ click fún ìkọ́ni AI taara, àwọn ìbéèrè, àti guest ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ipo, àti nígbà tí tí a ṣètò curriculum tàbí official course ìkàwé lè síbẹ̀ jẹ́ wúlò.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Rárá. wọ́n ìjápọ̀ nìkan láti àwọn ojú-ìwé gbangba, gbangba àwọn ipo àlejò, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àwọn ìbéèrè, àti àwọn ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́. ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Kì í ṣe across gbogbo àìní ẹ̀kọ́. Khan Academy jẹ́ wúlò fún tí a ṣètò àwọn ẹ̀kọ́ àti adaṣe. inspir jẹ́ wúlò nígbà tí akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò taara AI ìrànlọ́wọ́, Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìtọ́ni, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, ìdáhùn, tàbí ìṣàn iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ yí ká exact thing wọ́n jẹ́ working lórí.

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.

entries.source: People who learn better through conversation, questions, quizzes, and flashcards.
entries.value: Ènìyàn ta kọ́ dára síi nípasẹ̀ ìjíròrò, àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn quiz, àti àwọn kaadi ìrántí.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Prepared àwọn kóòsì, videos, àti exercises jẹ́ lágbára jù nígbà tí akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ knows kókó sequence.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Gbangba àwọn ipo jẹ́ tuned fún àwọn àlàyé, Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìtọ́ni, ìgbésẹ̀ àwọn ìṣàyẹ̀wò, àwọn quiz, àti àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Gbangba kókó URLs let àwọn ìwádìí such gẹ́gẹ́ bí AI olùkọ́ Socratic, AI olùkọ́ moṣẹ́ ilé, AI olùkọ́ kaadi ìrántí, àti talk láti historical figures AI land directly nínú matching ipo.

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Some àwọn ìwádìí nílò ìkàwé kóòsì. Some nílò taara olùkọ́ AI, ìtọ́ni, ìbéèrè Socratic, quiz, tàbí akopọ̀ kaadi ìrántí. wọ̀nyí àwọn ojú-ìwé ṣe yẹn choice tó mọ́ síi.

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Structured adaṣe ń ràn lọ́wọ́ kọ́ foundations kí àti lẹ́yìn iṣẹ́ ilé.

entries.source: Students who want hints or step checks without answer-copying.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta fẹ́ àwọn ìtọ́ni tàbí ìgbésẹ̀ àwọn ìṣàyẹ̀wò láìsí answer-copying.

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: Àwọn olùkọ́ tàbí àwọn òbí evaluating tó dojú kọ AI ẹ̀kọ́ behaviors kí ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdásílẹ̀.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Comparison àwọn ìwádìí yìí ibùdó jẹ́ tí a kọ́ láti ìdáhùn.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: Point jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti flatten two different àwọn irinṣẹ́ sí one winner. point jẹ́ láti match iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ láti ìhùwàsí yẹn ràn lọ́wọ́ fastest.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: Searches yìí ojú-ìwé jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ láti ìdáhùn.

entries.source: These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: Wọ̀nyí jẹ́ high-intent moments ibo akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ sábà nílò taara kíkọ́ni ìhùwàsí dípò another gbooro ojú-ìwé.

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: Wọ̀nyí phrases jẹ́ surfaced naturally lórí ojú-ìwé àti nínú tí a ṣètò discovery àwọn fáìlì so crawlers lè lóye exact comparison intent.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Yìí jẹ́ kì í ṣe ẹ̀sùn ìdájọ́ yẹn àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yẹ kí abandon Khan Academy. fún many àwọn kókó, trusted lesson ìkàwé àti taara Ipo Ẹ̀kọ́ AI iṣẹ́ tó dára jù papọ̀: kọ́ foundation, lẹ́yìn náà lo inspir láti béèrè àwọn ìbéèrè, túnṣe confusion, practise recall, tàbí gba unstuck.

entries.source: Tool comparison
entries.value: Irinṣẹ́ comparison

entries.source: Try the live AI learning path.
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò taara AI ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́.

entries.source: Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: Yí àlàyé sí quiz àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àti àtúnyẹ̀wò schedule based lórí kí ìwọ fojú kọ.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Ìdánilẹ́kọ̀ọ́

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Lo Taara ipo nígbà tí Ìwọ mọ̀ exact point ti confusion àti fẹ́ tó kàn àlàyé, ìbéèrè, ìtọ́ni, tàbí àtúnyẹ̀wò ìyípo.

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Lo Structured lesson nígbà tí Ìwọ mọ̀ course area àti fẹ́ sequenced àlàyé tàbí adaṣe set.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Àwọn ọ̀nà lílo

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Lo ojú-ìwé ìfiwéras láti ọ̀nà ìwádìí sí action.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: Lo Inspir àkọ́kọ́ nígbà tí Tirẹ wá jẹ́ nípa ìgbésẹ̀: ṣàlàyé yìí simply, béèrè mi Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè, fún mi iṣẹ́ ilé ìtọ́ni, ṣàyẹ̀wò mi ìṣirò ìgbésẹ̀, quiz mi, kọ́ àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àríyànjiyàn yìí kókó, tàbí ìrànlọ́wọ́ mi ṣètò àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: Lo inspir láti yí confusion sí àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn àpẹẹrẹ, adaṣe ìrántí, ìdáhùn lórí kíkọ, àríyànjiyàn, àti ti ara ẹni ẹ̀kọ́ ṣètò.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: Lo inspir nígbà tí ibi tí o di jẹ́ pato.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: Lo inspir nígbà tí o fẹ́ ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI gbangba ọ̀fẹ́ tó lè ṣàlàyé, béèrè, ṣe quiz, kọ́ni lórí iṣẹ́ ilé, kọ́ kaadi ìrántí, kí ó sì bá ohun gangan tí o di lórí mu.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: Lo àwọn ẹ̀kọ́ tí a ṣètò nígbà tí ọ̀nà náà bá mọ̀.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: Lo comparison below láti yan àkọ́kọ́ gbangba ipo tàbí ìtọ́sọ́nà.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: Lo lesson ìkàwé láti kọ́ official sequence àti practise core skills.

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: Lo ẹ̀tọ́ irinṣẹ́ fún iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́.

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: Lo àkókò Travel tàbí ẹni nínú ìtàn ipo, nígbà tí keeping generated dialogue separate láti documented àwọn orísun.

entries.source: Want the live learning version right now?
entries.value: Fẹ́ taara ẹ̀kọ́ ẹ̀dà right now?

entries.source: When should I use inspir first?
entries.value: Nígbà tí yẹ kí mo lo inspir àkọ́kọ́?

entries.source: When to use
entries.value: Nígbà tí láti lo

entries.source: When to use {value1}, and when to open inspir.
entries.value: Nígbà tí láti lo {value1}, àti nígbà tí láti ṣí inspir.

entries.source: Why make comparison pages at all?
entries.value: Kí nìdí tí ṣe ojú-ìwé ìfiwéras ní gbogbo?

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Bẹ́ẹ̀ni. dára ìṣàn iṣẹ́ jẹ́ láti kọ́ foundation láti trusted lesson source, lẹ́yìn náà lo inspir láti béèrè follow-up àwọn ìbéèrè, practise recall, túnṣe àwọn ìmọ̀ aṣìṣe, àti ṣètò kí láti àtúnyẹ̀wò tó kàn.
